# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: ingress-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: istio-ingress
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - ingress-gateway
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: "/"
        backend:
          serviceName: productpage
          servicePort: 9080
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: ingressgateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: istio-token-service
    jwksUri: <path_to_jwks>
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: productpage
spec:
  host: productpage
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
